race.comment: ELEVEN X (4) is yet to threaten in his two runs back but this looks a more suitable assignment third-up. Will just need a smart steer from Nock out there. THUNDER LIGHTS (14) has been knocking on the door for quite some time. Still a maiden so he gets in well at the weights for this. Doesn't need to improve much to finally break through. GRANDE DIABLO (5) broke his maiden last start over this course and distance, scoring by a nose. Sparingly raced and has more to offer. FINED FOR SPEEDING (10) is another still looking to get off the mark but has returned in good order this campaign and is desperate to break through. At his top now and is among the key chances. SUGARFIRE (9) has become a perennial placegetter but can't be forgotten.
